error_signature: Loop Node Only Processes the First Item
title: Nested loop node not processing items correctly on second run
symptom: The nested loop node processes data correctly for the first month but fails to extract data for the second month, going directly to the 'Done' branch.
applies_when: Processing multiple items in a loop
not_this_if: The workflow is not using nested loops
The issue occurs in a different context
root_cause: The nested loop node does not automatically reset its state between iterations. Without proper configuration, it may not recognize that it needs to process a new set of data, leading to premature completion of the loop.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the inner loop node
Set the reset condition to reference the last node from the outer loop, e.g., '{{ $prevNode.name == 'Group programs by days' }}'
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Enable the 'Reset' option in the inner loop node and configure it to reset based on the last executed node from the outer loop.
